After each symbol land, if the symbol explodes, the player wins the corresponding payout.
Winning symbols and payouts are made according to the “Paytable”.
After the payout of every round is made, the winning symbol that exploded will allow the symbol above it to cascade down for a new round.
Additional winning symbol will be tallied in every round until no more winning symbol can be tallied.
After the payout of every round is made, all winning symbols will explode allowing the symbols above them to cascade down for a new round.
Additional winning combination will be tallied in every round until no more winning combination can be tallied.
The game is played with {0} options Bet Amount with bet values ranging from {1} to {2}.
The Bet Amount is set using the "Bet Options" buttons.
"Cash Wallet" displays the cash available for wager.
A symbol win in cash is equal to the value shown in the "Paytable" multiplied by the bet amount.
Winning combinations and payouts are made according to the "Paytable".
A bet way win in cash is equal to the value shown in the "Paytable" multiplied by the bet amount.
Simultaneous wins on different bet ways are added.
Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet amount as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.
The maximum win amount is {0}x of the bet amout.
If the total win in the Main Game or the Free Spins Feature reaches {0}x of the bet amount, the spin ends.
Tap to start spin at the current Bet Amount.
Tap the button or the game area during a spin to stop the reels.
Press the <Space> key to start spin at the current Bet Amount.
When the reels are spinning, press the <Space> key to skip the reels spinning animation and reveal the reel results (subject to internet connection stability).
Tap to stop Auto Spin. The number on the button indicates the remaining number of spins for Auto Spin.
Tap to reduce the Bet Amount.
Tap to increase the Bet Amount.
Tap to display the balance of available wallets.
Tap to display the Bet Options.
Bet Amount: select the Bet Amount.
Tap to display the Game History.
Auto Spin automatically plays the game for a selected number of spins.
Tap on the values to select number of Auto Spins.
Tap to cycle through spin speed settings: Normal, Turbo, and Super Turbo.
Tap to turn sound ON or OFF.
Shows the game rules and button functions.
Shows details of the previous games played. Scroll down to the end to load more records.
Tap to select the dates of games to be shown in History.
Tap to return to the Main Game.

In the event of disputes over game results, all game results that are shown in the game history page are absolute and final.

Play multiple spins instantly and view all results at once.
Gold Plated symbols appears on reels 2,3 and 4 only.
During any spins, some symbols (excluding Wild symbol and Scatter symbol) in reel 2,3 and/or 4 may appear in gold.
At every new round after the new symbols have cascaded down, any Gold Plated symbol(s) that is involved in a win in the previous round will be transformed into Wild symbol(s).
During any spins, all wins will be multiplied by the multiplier shown above the reels, starting with x1 in the first round.
Any win in the first round will increase the second round’s multiplier to x2.
Any win in the second round will increase the third round’s multiplier to x3.
Any win in the third round will increase the fourth round’s (and beyond) multiplier to x5.
3 Scatter symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Free Spins Feature with 10 free spins. Each additional Scatter symbol will trigger 2 more free spins.
During the Free Spins Feature, all symbols (excluding Wild symbol and Scatter symbol) in reel 3 will appear in gold.
The multipliers above the reels will be increased to x2, x4, x6 and x10 respectively.
Bet ways win if the winning symbols are in succession from the leftmost reel to the right.
Total number of winning bet ways for each symbol are calculated by multiplying the number of adjacent winning symbols on each symbols from the leftmost reel to the right.
The winning symbol payout is multiplied by the number of winning bet ways.
Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols except Scatter symbol.
3 Scatter symbols will trigger free spins.
Wild symbol substitues for all symbols except Scatter symbol.
The game is played with {0} options Bet Amount for 2,000 ways, with bet values ranging from {1} to {2}.
Bet Amount x Symbol Payout Values x Way(s) x Multiplier
Free Spins are ready to go
Free Spins Feature can be instantly triggered from the Main Game by buying it for 75x current bet amount.
When buying Free Spins Feature, at least 3 Scatter symbols are guaranteed to appear on the triggering spin.
Mahjong Dragon Ways is a 5-reel, 4-row (with an additional row for each of reel 2,3 and 4) video slot featuring Wild symbol transformation and free spins with increasing multiplier.
